raw_answer_text mapped from solution option letter C to the corresponding choice text

issues: metadata.image_paths is empty while top-level image_paths contains an image path

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says 'as shown in the image below'
the task depends on reading finite-length input x[n] and output y[n] from a plotted visual signal representation
multi_step: solving requires extracting both x[n] and y[n] from the image and inferring the LTI impulse response h[n]
the problem likely involves deconvolution/convolution reasoning rather than direct lookup
multiple-choice format with 4 candidate impulse responses suggests comparison after derivation, not just single-step recognition
verifiability: answer is a concrete finite sequence: h[n] = {1, 1, 1, 1}
choices are explicit and discrete, enabling exact-match checking
for an LTI system, the proposed h[n] can in principle be verified by checking whether x[n] * h[n] matches y[n] once the image data are read
registry_passed=true and answer_present=true support basic asset availability
